query.original: Do you add your proficiency bonus to every saving throw?
query.used: Do you add your proficiency bonus to every saving throw?

So if you're proficient in Athletics, you apply your proficiency bonus to the Constitution check just as you would normally do for a Strength (Athletics) check.

answer: No, you add your proficiency bonus to saving throws only if you are proficient in the ability score associated with that saving throw. For example, a wizard adds his proficiency bonus to Intelligence saving throws because he is proficient in Intelligence saves. A character without proficiency in a saving throw gains no benefit from his proficiency bonus when making that saving throw.
